projectDescription: Free, open-source desktop accounting software for small and medium businesses, featuring double-entry accounting, invoicing, POS, inventory management, and financial reports.
keyFeatures: Double-entry accounting with general ledger, profit & loss, balance sheet, and trial balance reports
Invoicing and billing for sales and purchases
Integrated Point of Sale (POS) with loyalty programs and coupon codes
Inventory management with stock movements, shipments, and purchase receipts
Works fully offline as a desktop application (Electron + SQLite)
Multi-currency and regional tax support (e.g., GST for India)
Customizable print templates for invoices and reports
publicApiSurface: Dashboard — financial overview with cash flow, expenses, and unpaid invoices
Sales Invoice — create, edit, and track customer invoices
Purchase Invoice — manage vendor bills and payables
Payment — record incoming and outgoing payments
Journal Entry — manual ledger adjustments
Chart of Accounts — manage account hierarchy
General Ledger Report — full transaction history
Profit and Loss Report — revenue vs. expenses
Balance Sheet Report — assets, liabilities, and equity
Trial Balance Report — debit/credit verification
Point of Sale — retail transaction interface
Stock Movement — inventory transfers and adjustments
Shipment / Purchase Receipt — goods in/out tracking
Item & Item Group — product catalog management
Party (Customer/Supplier) — contact and vendor records
Tax — define and apply tax rules
Print Templates — customize invoice/report layouts
Import Wizard — bulk data import from CSV
Settings — accounting, inventory, and POS configuration
Customize Form — extend fields on existing documents
